name: NBCFDC General Loan Scheme
benefit_description: Loan up to ₹15 Lakh per beneficiary for pursuing income generating activities such as Agriculture and Allied Activities, Small Business/Artisan & Traditional Occupation, Transport Sector & Service Sector, and Technical & Professional Trades/Courses. The rate of interest would be as follows - Loan up
details: A general loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice for Indian citizens from backward classes for various income-generating activities. Loan up to ₹15 Lakh per beneficiary for pursuing income-generating activities such as Agriculture and Allied Activities, Small Business/Artisan & Traditional Occupation, Transport Sector & Service Sector, and Technical & Professional Trades/Courses.
eligibility_text: The applicant must be an Entrepreneur The applicant must be from a Backward Class (OBC). The Total Annual Family Income of the applicant must be Less than ₹ 3 Lakh per Annum.
